title: Signup + Login
description: Walkthrough of the LaunchSteady signup flow — package selection, billing, and login.

fields.label: Demo full name
fields.hint: Name that will be typed into the signup form

fields.label: Demo email
fields.hint: Used on both the signup and login screens

fields.label: Demo phone number
fields.hint: Local number without country code — Singapore (+65) is pre-selected

fields.label: Demo password
fields.hint: Shown as dots on screen — used on both signup and login

fields.label: Watermark logo
fields.hint: PNG or SVG — composited into the final video via ffmpeg overlay
